description: Design a professional 'Employee of the Month' certificate for 'Jordan Lee' in Wondershare EdrawMax using landscape orientation. The design must include a decorative border, a badge or seal icon, and the following text: 'Certificate of Achievement' (Header), 'Jordan Lee' (Recipient), 'Summit Tech Solutions' (Company), 'For Outstanding Performance as Employee of the Month' (Reason), and 'October 2025' (Date). Save the project file to /home/ga/Documents/certificate_jordan_lee.eddx and export the design to /home/ga/Documents/certificate_jordan_lee.pdf and /home/ga/Documents/certificate_jordan_lee.png.
